userText: 帮我做一个更像 deer-flow / OpenHanako 的 AI Team 开源最小样板，至少具备多角色编排、workspace、artifact、registry、memory、report。

memorySeeds.title: Harness-first execution must stay explicit
memorySeeds.text: DeerFlow-style strong execution bases should keep broker transport, queue, lease, retry, failover, and authority evidence visible in runtime output.

memorySeeds.title: Independent agent access should stay first-class
memorySeeds.text: OpenHanako-style independent agent access requires host-layer, session, desk, plugin, and bridge capabilities to remain explicit rather than hidden behind a single host runtime.

memorySeeds.title: Provider registry should stay visible
memorySeeds.text: A strong standalone harness should make provider registry and runtime adapter boundaries explicit in output and review.

memorySeeds.title: Sandbox and tool runtime need evidence
memorySeeds.text: Reviewers should expect workspace sandbox, tool runtime evidence, and tool-runs.json rather than only narrative claims.

memorySeeds.title: Critic can trigger replan
memorySeeds.text: If retrieval-backed evidence is missing, critic should return revise and ask executor to补 retrieval evidence before judge finalizes.

memorySeeds.title: Streaming should be observable
memorySeeds.text: A strong harness should expose chunk-level streaming evidence and persist stream events for later inspection and resume.

memorySeeds.title: Broker transport should be visible
memorySeeds.text: A stronger standalone harness should route execution through a broker job API, keep broker events, and expose remote-style transport evidence in runtime output.

memorySeeds.title: Lease and retry should be observable
memorySeeds.text: A durable broker should expose lease acquired/expired/released and retry events, and queue state should survive as files under runtime/.

toolRegistry.note: run allowlisted commands in guarded workspace

persona.mission: exercise the productized standalone broker substrate through a stable regression facade
exercise the productized standalone broker substrate through a stable regression facade

workQueue.title: 生成执行计划
workQueue.objective: 帮我做一个更像 deer-flow / OpenHanako 的 AI Team 开源最小样板，至少具备多角色编排、workspace、artifact、registry、memory、report。
workQueue.task: 给出最小开源 harness 样板的规划。

workQueue.title: 生成最小样板交付
workQueue.objective: 帮我做一个更像 deer-flow / OpenHanako 的 AI Team 开源最小样板，至少具备多角色编排、workspace、artifact、registry、memory、report。
workQueue.task: 先输出最小可运行样板的核心交付，但先不要主动补 retrieval 证据。
workQueue.acceptance: 给出 workspace / artifact / report 级结果。

workQueue.title: 审查最小样板结果
workQueue.objective: 审查 executor 结果是否达到独立最小 harness 标准。
workQueue.task: 基于 planner 与 executor 结果给出 review verdict；如果缺少 retrieval 证据，要明确要求 replan。
workQueue.acceptance: 返回 approve / revise 级别结论。

workQueue.title: 补 retrieval 证据
workQueue.objective: 帮我做一个更像 deer-flow / OpenHanako 的 AI Team 开源最小样板，至少具备多角色编排、workspace、artifact、registry、memory、report。
workQueue.task: 基于 blackboard / durable memory 做 retrieval，并补齐样板中的 retrieval-backed evidence。
workQueue.acceptance: 产出 retrieval addendum，并把 retrieval 结果补进 deliverable。

metadata.retrievalQuery: provider registry runtime adapter workspace sandbox memory retrieval replan

workQueue.title: 复审 retrieval 补充结果
workQueue.objective: 确认 retrieval-backed evidence 已补齐。
workQueue.task: 检查 retrieval addendum 与 deliverable 的 Memory Retrieval 章节，并给出最终 review。

workQueue.title: 裁决是否可作为开源样板
workQueue.objective: 给出最终是否可交付的裁决。
workQueue.task: 综合 planner / executor / critic 输出做 final decision。
